name: lambda-box-node-sdk
description: AWS Lambda Node 22 ESM shell for Box folder and enterprise user listing with box-node-sdk v10 JWT auth

scripts.invoke:local: sam local invoke --template template.yaml GetBoxFilesFunction -e events/get-box-files.json
scripts.invoke:local:users: sam local invoke --template template.yaml BoxListUsersFunction -e events/box-list-users.json
scripts.invoke:local:get-submission-date: sam local invoke --template template.yaml GetSubmissionDateFunction -e events/get-submission-date.json
scripts.invoke:local:set-submission-date: sam local invoke --template template.yaml SetSubmissionDateFunction -e events/set-submission-date.json
scripts.invoke:local:delete-properties-template: sam local invoke --template template.yaml DeletePropertiesTemplateFunction -e events/delete-properties-template.json
scripts.invoke:local:delete-submission-date: sam local invoke --template template.yaml DeleteSubmissionDateFunction -e events/delete-submission-date.json
